title: QIAseq FastSelect Extraction
author: Opentrons
materials: Before this protocol the RNA plate should have went through the thermocycler according to FastSelect 5s/16s/23s, Table 3 and placed on a back on the temperature deck on slot 7.

steps.title: The Reagent plate will be placed...
steps.instruction: The Reagent plate will be placed on the temperature module on slot 10, which will contain MasterMix in column 1 and magentic beads in column 2.

steps.title: The reservoir will be placed on...
steps.instruction: The reservoir will be placed on slot 2, which will contain Nucleas Free Water in well 1, Binding Buffer in well 2, and Ethanol in wells 3 and 4. Wells 10, 11 and 12 will be used for supernatent removal.
